ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model configuration */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the model */,
  "max_token" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tokens in the input */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "embedding_dim" INTEGER /* Dimension of the embedding layer */,
  "encoder_kernel" INTEGER /* Kernel size for the encoder */,
  "decoder_kernel" INTEGER /* Kernel size for the decoder */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model configuration */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., NLP, CV) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* ML framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration used in the experiment */,
  "avg_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy across different seeds */,
  "min_accuracy" REAL /* Minimum accuracy across different seeds */,
  "max_accuracy" REAL /* Maximum accuracy across different seeds */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the accuracy across different seeds */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the accuracy across different seeds */,
  "reference_seed" INTEGER /* Reference seed used in the experiment */,
  "num_runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs considered for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seeds" (
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed */,
  "seed_value" INTEGER /* Value of the seed used in the experiment */,
  "seed_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the seed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_seeds" (
  "experiment_seed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-seed pair */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model for this seed */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime in seconds for the model run with this seed */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB for the model run with this seed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_seed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_seeds_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_seeds_seed_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_id") REFERENCES seeds ("seed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access for more granular tracking */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who committed the version */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
